subject: Use SO simulutor in cmso-robot
commit_message:
Use SO simulutor in cmso-robot

Removed obsolete lines

Update charts to use ElAlto STAGING versions

Issue-ID: OPTFRA-509
Change-Id: If8d12e3b49781e4833faeab4b0f389b20bdb0ec3
Signed-off-by: Jerry Flood <jflood@att.com>

Patch Set 5:

Deploying El Alto containers (2.1-STAGING-latest) but the job builder is failing. 

13:06:19 [ERROR] Only release images are allowed in helm charts.

Please advise on how to move forward building and testing El Alto changes
Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

I think CI job failure can be ignored in this context. I dont see other way on how to move forward before official non-staging images are available. Or can we make such version already now which should pass that CI check ?? Please note this is important feature from offline deployments perspective, we need to get this merged so we can simplify offline deployments quite a bit

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Patch Set 5:

Please take a look at: https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/OOM+Repository+for+Release+and+Staging+Environments+Proposal

Patch Set 5:

Vikas, can you please test the 2.1 version to make sure it looks okay and update the patch with the release version instead of the staging.
